category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Cambodia (ISC) standards, conformity/import inspection, and energy programme requirements.

title.en: China-to-Cambodia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Cambodian requirements administered by the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC), including Cambodia Standard (CS) adoption of IEC/ASEAN standards, conformity and import inspection for regulated products, energy programmes, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与柬埔寨标准局（ISC）管理的柬埔寨要求对照，涵盖柬埔寨标准（CS）对IEC/东盟标准的采用、受监管产品的合格评定与进口检验、能源计划及在地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與柬埔寨標準局（ISC）管理的柬埔寨要求對照，涵蓋柬埔寨標準（CS）對IEC/東盟標準的採用、受監管產品的合格評定與進口檢驗、能源計劃及在地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Cambodian legislation, ISC-adopted Cambodia Standards (CS), import inspection and conformity procedures, energy programme requirements, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行柬埔寨法律、ISC采用的柬埔寨标准（CS）、进口检验与合格评定程序、能源计划要求及进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行柬埔寨法律、ISC採用的柬埔寨標準（CS）、進口檢驗與合格評定程序、能源計劃要求及進口商義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers exporting to Cambodia should address: (1) electrical safety against ISC-adopted CS/IEC 60335-2-24 (Cambodia adopts IEC and ASEAN standards through the Institute of Standards of Cambodia) — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not automatically recognised; (2) energy performance under Cambodian energy programmes, which differ in methodology from China's GB 12021.2; (3) conformity and import inspection for regulated products plus an in-country importer of record; and (4) electrical fit for Cambodia's 230 V / 50 Hz grid — the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V. R-600a refrigerant is consistent with regional practice. Cambodia does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime; those EU-style obligations do not apply. Status: verified false, informational only.
answer_first.zh: 向柬埔寨出口的中国家用电冰箱制造商应处理：（1）依据ISC采用的CS/IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全（柬埔寨通过柬埔寨标准局采用IEC和东盟标准）——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被自动承认；（2）柬埔寨能源计划下的能效，其方法与中国GB 12021.2不同；（3）受监管产品的合格评定与进口检验，以及在地进口商（进口记录方）；（4）适配柬埔寨230 V / 50 Hz电网——50 Hz频率与中国相同，但标称电压与中国的220/380 V不同。R-600a制冷剂符合区域惯例。柬埔寨不实行欧盟式横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度；该类欧盟式义务不适用。状态：verified false，仅供参考。
answer_first.zht: 向柬埔寨出口的中國家用電冰箱製造商應處理：（1）依據ISC採用的CS/IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全（柬埔寨通過柬埔寨標準局採用IEC和東盟標準）——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被自動承認；（2）柬埔寨能源計劃下的能效，其方法與中國GB 12021.2不同；（3）受監管產品的合格評定與進口檢驗，以及在地進口商（進口記錄方）；（4）適配柬埔寨230 V / 50 Hz電網——50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓與中國的220/380 V不同。R-600a製冷劑符合區域慣例。柬埔寨不實行歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度；該類歐盟式義務不適用。狀態：verified false，僅供參考。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
